title: Goalundo Ghāt Heat Wave
lead: Goalundo Ghāt is experiencing a severe heat wave with a Z-Score of +3.89. This critical event has a score of 10.0/10, indicating extreme conditions.
body:
The current heat wave in Goalundo Ghāt is causing extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Day (CDD) value of 12.6 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 78%, making the heat feel even more oppressive. 
 The wind speed of 22.4 km/h is not providing much relief from the heat.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave response protocols immediately
